mapper.sql: id, tenant_id, care_plan_id, patient_id, task_type, scheduled_at, channel, status, assigned_to, completed_at, result_summary, created_at
mapper.select:
SELECT
FROM followup_task WHERE tenant_id = #{tenantId} ORDER BY id DESC
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO followup_task ( tenant_id, care_plan_id, patient_id, task_type, scheduled_at, channel, status, assigned_to, completed_at, result_summary ) VALUES ( #{tenantId}, #{carePlanId}, #{patientId}, #{taskType}, #{scheduledAt}, #{channel}, #{status}, #{assignedTo}, #{completedAt}, #{resultSummary} )
mapper.update: UPDATE followup_task SET care_plan_id = #{carePlanId}, patient_id = #{patientId}, task_type = #{taskType}, scheduled_at = #{scheduledAt}, channel = #{channel}, status = #{status}, assigned_to = #{assignedTo}, completed_at = #{completedAt}, result_summary = #{resultSummary} WHERE tenant_id = #{tenantId} AND id = #{id}
